data.content:
### Retrieve Supabase GoTrue API Version using cURL Source: https://github.com/supabase/supabase/blob/master/apps/docs/content/troubleshooting/how-do-i-check-gotrueapi-version-of-a-supabase-project-lQAnOR.mdx This cURL command demonstrates how to make a GET request to the Supabase GoTrue API's health check endpoint. It requires your project's reference and an API key to authenticate and fetch the current GoTrue version and service details. ```shell curl -X GET 'https://project-ref.supabase.co/auth/v1/health' -H 'apikey: ANON_KEY' ``` -------------------------------- ### Generate Auth Confirmation Link with Supabase-JS Admin API Source: https://github.com/supabase/supabase/blob/master/apps/www/_blog/2021-07-28-supabase-auth-passwordless-sms-login.mdx This code snippet illustrates how to generate various authentication links (e.g., invite, confirmation, recovery, magic) using the `supabase-js` admin API's `generateLink` method. This functionality requires a `service_role` admin key and should only be invoked from a secure backend environment, not directly from a client application. ```javascript const { data, error } = await supabase.auth.api.generateLink( 'invite', 'user@email.com', { redirectTo: 'http://localhost:3000/welcome' } ) ``` -------------------------------- ### Register an OAuth Client Programmatically with Supabase Admin API Source: https://github.com/supabase/supabase/blob/master/apps/docs/content/guides/auth/oauth-server/getting-started.mdx This snippet demonstrates how to create an OAuth client for a Supabase project using its admin API. It requires a service role key for authentication and allows specifying client name, redirect URIs, and client type (confidential or public). The process returns a client ID and, for confidential clients, a client secret which must be stored securely. ```typescript import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js' const supabase = createClient( 'https://your-project.supabase.co', 'your-service-role-key' // Use service_role key for admin operations ) // Create an OAuth client const { data, error } = await supabase.auth.admin.oauth.createClient({ name: 'My Third-Party App', redirect_uris: ['https://my-app.com/auth/callback', 'https://my-app.com/auth/silent-callback'], client_type: 'confidential' }) if (error) { console.error('Error creating client:', error) } else { console.log('Client created:', data) console.log('Client ID:', data.client_id) console.log('Client Secret:', data.client_secret) // Store this securely! } ``` ```python from supabase import create_client supabase = create_client( 'https://your-project.supabase.co', 'your-service-role-key' # Use service_role key for admin operations ) # Create an OAuth client response = supabase.auth.admin.oauth.create_client({ 'name': 'My Third-Party App', 'redirect_uris': [ 'https://my-app.com/auth/callback', 'https://my-app.com/auth/silent-callback' ], 'client_type': 'confidential' }) print('Client created:', response) print('Client ID:', response.client_id) print('Client Secret:', response.client_secret) # Store this securely! ``` ```bash curl -X POST 'https://.supabase.co/auth/v1/admin/oauth/clients' \ -H "Authorization: Bearer ${SUPABASE_SECRET_KEY}" \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -d '{ "name": "My Third-Party App", "redirect_uris": [ "https://my-app.com/auth/callback", "https://my-app.com/auth/silent-callback" ], "client_type": "confidential" }' ``` ```bash curl -X POST 'http://localhost:54321/auth/v1/admin/oauth/clients' \ -H "Authorization: Bearer ${SUPABASE_SECRET_KEY}" \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -d '{ "name": "Local Dev App", "redirect_uris": ["http://localhost:3000/auth/callback"], "client_type": "confidential" }' ``` -------------------------------- ### Retrieve Supabase Project API Keys Programmatically using Management API with cURL Source: https://github.com/supabase/supabase/blob/master/apps/docs/content/_partials/metrics_access.mdx This cURL command shows how to optionally exchange an account access token for project-specific API keys via the Supabase Management API. It requires setting environment variables for your Supabase access token and project reference, then makes an authenticated request to retrieve the API keys. ```bash export SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN="your-access-token" export PROJECT_REF="your-project-ref" curl -H "Authorization: Bearer $SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN" \ "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/$PROJECT_REF/api-keys?reveal=true" ``` -------------------------------- ### Update Email Templates via Supabase Management API Source: https://github.com/supabase/supabase/blob/master/apps/www/_blog/2025-12-03-introducing-seven-new-email-templates-for-auth.mdx Use the Supabase Management API to programmatically manage security notification email templates. This example enables the MFA factor enrolled notification and customizes its content using a PATCH request to the Auth service configuration endpoint with bearer token authentication. ```bash # Get your access token from https://supabase.com/dashboard/account/tokens export SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN="your-access-token" export PROJECT_REF="your-project-ref" # Update email templates curl -X PATCH "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/$PROJECT_REF/config/auth" \ -H "Authorization: Bearer $SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN" \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -d '{ "mailer_notifications_mfa_factor_enrolled_enabled": true, "mailer_subjects_mfa_factor_enrolled_notification": "A new MFA factor has been enrolled", "mailer_templates_mfa_factor_enrolled_notification_content": "

A new MFA factor has been enrolled

A new factor ({{ .FactorType }}) has been enrolled for your account {{ .Email }}.

" }' ``` -------------------------------- ### GET /v1/projects/{PROJECT_REF}/api-keys Source: https://github.com/supabase/supabase/blob/master/apps/docs/content/_partials/metrics_access.mdx Programmatically exchange an account access token for a project's API keys. This is useful for automating the setup of observability tooling or other services requiring project-specific API keys. ```APIDOC ## GET /v1/projects/{PROJECT_REF}/api-keys ### Description This Management API endpoint allows you to retrieve the API keys for a specific Supabase project, given an account access token. It can optionally reveal the actual secret keys. ### Method GET ### Endpoint `https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/{PROJECT_REF}/api-keys` ### Parameters #### Path Parameters - **PROJECT_REF** (string) - Required - The unique reference identifier of your Supabase project. #### Query Parameters - **reveal** (boolean) - Optional - Set to `true` to include the actual secret values of the API keys in the response. Default is `false`. #### Request Body None ### Authentication This endpoint uses Bearer Token authentication. - **Authorization**: `Bearer ` (An account access token from Account Settings > Access Tokens). ### Request Example ```bash export SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN="your-access-token" export PROJECT_REF="your-project-ref" curl -H "Authorization: Bearer $SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN" \ "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/$PROJECT_REF/api-keys?reveal=true" ``` ### Response #### Success Response (200) A list of API keys associated with the specified project. #### Response Example ```json [ { "id": "key_id_1", "name": "anon_key", "api_key": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...", "created_at": "2023-01-01T12:00:00Z" }, { "id": "key_id_2", "name": "service_role_key", "api_key": "eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9...", "created_at": "2023-01-01T12:00:00Z" } ] ``` ``` -------------------------------- ### Update Supabase Auth Email Templates and Notifications via API (curl) Source: https://github.com/supabase/supabase/blob/master/apps/docs/content/guides/auth/auth-email-templates.mdx This `curl` command sends a PATCH request to the Supabase API to configure various authentication-related email templates and notification settings. It allows customization of subjects and HTML content for confirmation, magic link, password recovery, invite, reauthentication, and email change emails, as well as enabling and customizing notifications for password changes, email changes, phone changes, MFA factor enrollment/unenrolment, and identity linking/unlinking events. Ensure you replace `$PROJECT_REF` with your project reference and `$SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN` with a valid access token. ```bash curl -X PATCH "https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/$PROJECT_REF/config/auth" \ -H "Authorization: Bearer $SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN" \ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \ -d '{ "mailer_subjects_confirmation": "Confirm your signup", "mailer_templates_confirmation_content": "

Confirm your signup

Follow this link to confirm your user:

Confirm your email

", "mailer_subjects_magic_link": "Your Magic Link", "mailer_templates_magic_link_content": "

Magic Link

Follow this link to login:

Log In

", "mailer_subjects_recovery": "Rest Your Password", "mailer_templates_recovery_content": "

Reset Password

Follow this link to reset the password for your user:

Reset Password

", "mailer_subjects_invite": "You have been invited", "mailer_templates_invite_content": "

You have been invited

You have been invited to create a user on {{ .SiteURL }}. Follow this link to accept the invite:

Accept the invite

", "mailer_subjects_reauthentication": "Confirm reauthentication", "mailer_templates_reauthentication_content": "

Confirm reauthentication

Enter the code: {{token}}

", "mailer_subjects_email_change": "Confirm email change", "mailer_templates_email_change_content": "

Confirm email change

Follow this link to confirm the update of your email:

Change email

", "mailer_notifications_password_changed_enabled": true, "mailer_subjects_password_changed_notification": "Your password has been changed", "mailer_templates_password_changed_notification_content": "

Your password has been changed

\n\n

This is a confirmation that the password for your account {{ .Email }} has just been changed.

\n

If you did not make this change, please contact support.

", "mailer_notifications_email_changed_enabled": true, "mailer_subjects_email_changed_notification": "Your email address has been changed", "mailer_templates_email_changed_notification_content": "

Your email address has been changed

\n\n

The email address for your account has been changed from {{ .OldEmail }} to {{ .Email }}.

\n

If you did not make this change, please contact support.

", "mailer_notifications_phone_changed_enabled": true, "mailer_subjects_phone_changed_notification": "Your phone number has been changed", "mailer_templates_phone_changed_notification_content": "

Your phone number has been changed

\n\n

The phone number for your account {{ .Email }} has been changed from {{ .OldPhone }} to {{ .Phone }}.

\n

If you did not make this change, please contact support immediately.

", "mailer_notifications_mfa_factor_enrolled_enabled": true, "mailer_subjects_mfa_factor_enrolled_notification": "A new MFA factor has been enrolled", "mailer_templates_mfa_factor_enrolled_notification_content": "

A new MFA factor has been enrolled

\n\n

A new factor ({{ .FactorType }}) has been enrolled for your account {{ .Email }}.

\n

If you did not make this change, please contact support immediately.

", "mailer_notifications_mfa_factor_unenrolled_enabled": true, "mailer_subjects_mfa_factor_unenrolled_notification": "An MFA factor has been unenrolled", "mailer_templates_mfa_factor_unenrolled_notification_content": "

An MFA factor has been unenrolled

\n\n

A factor ({{ .FactorType }}) has been unenrolled for your account {{ .Email }}.

\n

If you did not make this change, please contact support immediately.

", "mailer_notifications_identity_linked_enabled": true, "mailer_subjects_identity_linked_notification": "A new identity has been linked", "mailer_templates_identity_linked_notification_content": "

A new identity has been linked

\n\n

A new identity ({{ .Provider }}) has been linked to your account {{ .Email }}.

\n

If you did not make this change, please contact support immediately.

", "mailer_notifications_identity_unlinked_enabled": true, "mailer_subjects_identity_unlinked_notification": "An identity has been unlinked", "mailer_templates_identity_unlinked_notification_content": "

An identity has been unlinked

\n\n

An identity ({{ .Provider }}) has been unlinked from your account {{ .Email }}.

\n

If you did not make this change, please contact support immediately.

" }' ```
